title: Pan-Seared Russian Salmon with Almond Crust
description: A simple and flavorful recipe for pan-seared salmon with a crunchy almond crust. This dish is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
In a shallow dish, mix together the almond flour and a pinch of salt.
Dip each salmon fillet into the almond flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Heat the butter and stir-fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the coated salmon fillets to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Serve the salmon with steamed asparagus and a side of rich beef broth.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
